pr.title: GrZebes and GrOnett matches, match & link GrGarden
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Matched additional stage code in GrZebes and GrOnett, finished matching/linking GrGarden, and updated symbols/configuration accordingly. The PR promoted `src/melee/gr/grgarden.c` from NonMatching to Matching, renamed several anonymous `fn_` symbols to stage-prefixed names, added concrete prototypes and ground-variable fields, and converted multiple previously stubbed `/// #` functions into matching C. decomp.dev reported 6 new matches, +1152 matched-code bytes, +2752 linked-code bytes, and +312 linked-data bytes.
what_changed: Changed `configure.py` so `melee/gr/grgarden.c` is built as `Object(Matching, ...)` instead of `Object(NonMatching, ...)`.

Implemented GrOnett matches for `grOnett_801E3930` and `grOnett_801E3C60`, including camera subject setup through `Camera_80029020`, `mpJointSetCb1` callbacks, `grOnett_801E5214`, `grOnett_801E5538`, `Ground_801C5794`, `lb_800115F4`, and `Ground_801C2FE0` calls.
Updated `grOnett_801E54B4` from a 5-argument loose-int callback prototype to `void grOnett_801E54B4(Ground*, s32, CollData*, s32, mpLib_GroundEnum, f32)` and added the corresponding forward includes.
Added `CmSubject* x104` to `struct grOnett_GroundVars` in `types.h` for Onett camera/subject state.

Implemented GrZebes matches for `grZebes_801D9758`, `grZebes_801D9F30`, and `grZebes_801DA4FC`; these set up fighter collision/device callbacks, initialize Zebes ground vars, run stage animation setup, set ground flags, decrement `grZe_804D6998`, and call `Ground_801C4A08`.
Typed `struct grZebes_GroundVars.x4` as `u32` instead of `UNK_T` and added a separate `struct grZebes_GroundVars2` with `u16 xC4`, then added `zebes2` to the `Ground` union.
Renamed GrGarden functions from anonymous `fn_80202D9C`, `fn_80203498`, and `fn_8020349C` to `grGarden_80202D9C`, `grGarden_80203498`, and `grGarden_8020349C` in C, headers, callsites, and symbols.
Renamed GrZebes anonymous symbols `fn_801D9758` and `fn_801DCBFC` to `grZebes_801D9758` and `grZebes_801DCBFC`.

Adjusted GrGarden data symbols and sizes in `config/GALE01/symbols.txt`, including making several GrGarden constants/local strings local `@NNN` symbols and resizing `grGd_803E52E0` and `grGd_804D6A28`.

Cleaned up GrGarden by removing matched-function marker comments, using `gobj->user_data` in `grGarden_80203250`, and rewriting the absolute-value/random-range expression in a form that reached 100% match.
smart_moves: Promoted GrGarden to Matching only after resolving both code and data/symbol alignment issues, rather than treating the code match independently from linked data.
Replaced generic `fn_` names with module-prefixed address names once callsites and declarations were known, improving symbol searchability without inventing semantic names.
Matched Onett by adding the missing type information around the map camera subject (`CmSubject* x104`) instead of leaving the function in `UNK_RET`/`UNK_PARAMS` form.

Updated callback signatures to reflect the actual engine API shape, especially `grOnett_801E54B4` taking `mpLib_GroundEnum` and an extra `f32`, which made callback registration via `mpJointSetCb1` type-correct.
For GrGarden, adjusted local-vs-global data symbols in `symbols.txt`; this is important for linked-data progress and prevents unrelated constants from being exported under misleading `grGd_` names.
Used small expression-shape changes in `grGarden_80203250` to get the final 99.21% to 100.00% match, showing that nearby helper abstractions or temporaries can affect codegen.
decomp_lessons: Stage functions often become matchable after the per-stage `GroundVars` union is split or expanded to reflect actual overlay-specific layouts, as with `grZebes_GroundVars2` and `grOnett_GroundVars.x104`.
When matching stage object callbacks, update headers and forward includes at the same time as the C body; missing exact callback parameter types can block clean matching and linking.
Do not assume all neighboring data labels are global stage symbols. GrGarden required several constants/strings/floats to become local `@NNN` labels with correct sizes and alignment.
A stage file moving to `Object(Matching, ...)` may require both function matches and symbol-table corrections for `.data`, `.sdata`, `.sbss`, and `.sdata2`.
For decomp.dev progress, very small byte improvements can be meaningful: `grGarden_80203250` improved by only +5 bytes but completed the function and enabled the matching classification.
Evidence for reviewer intent is weak in this slice: the PR body was empty and there were no human review comments, so lessons are inferred from diffs and bot match reports only.
naming_conventions: Use stage-module prefixes for address-based function names: `grZebes_801D9758`, `grZebes_801DCBFC`, `grGarden_80202D9C`, `grGarden_80203498`, `grGarden_8020349C`.
Avoid retaining generic `fn_XXXXXXXX` names after a function is associated with a stage module and has local callsites/prototypes.
Use compact per-stage data prefixes in symbols: `grGd_` for Garden, `grZe_`/`grZebes_` for Zebes, `grOnett_` for Onett functions.
Keep address comments in headers for stage functions, e.g. `/* 202D9C */ void grGarden_80202D9C(Ground_GObj*);`.
Use local `@NNN` labels in `symbols.txt` for local constants and strings instead of forcing exported-looking `grGd_` or `it_` names.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Replaced `GET_GROUND(gobj)` with direct `gobj->user_data` in `grGarden_80203250` where that expression shape matched better.
Inlined the absolute-value computation in `grGarden_80203250` as a ternary over `grGd_804D6A28->x1C - grGd_804D6A28->x18`, then assigned it to an integer before `HSD_Randi`.
Removed a commented-out `HSD_JObjMtxIsDirty(jobj)` line from GrGarden after matching the actual emitted code path.
Used `PAD_STACK(8)` in `grOnett_801E3C60`, indicating a stack-shape tactic was needed for the match.

Matched simple stage setup functions by preserving direct field writes and engine call order: callback registration before camera subject initialization in `grOnett_801E3930`, and animation setup before flag writes in `grZebes_801D9F30`.
Corrected data symbol scopes and sizes in `symbols.txt` to improve linked-data matching, including localizing GrGarden `.sdata2` floats/doubles and `.sdata` strings.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided slice.
decomp.dev bot reported GALE01 matched code 50.33% (+0.03%, +1152 bytes), linked code 30.03% (+0.07%, +2752 bytes), and linked data 28.67% (+0.03%, +312 bytes).
decomp.dev bot listed 6 new matches: `grOnett_801E3930`, `grOnett_801E3C60`, `grZebes_801D9F30`, `grZebes_801D9758`, `grZebes_801DA4FC`, and `grGarden_80203250`.
decomp.dev bot listed unmatched-section improvements for `main/melee/gr/gronett` `.sdata2`, `main/melee/gr/grgarden` `.sdata2`, and `main/melee/gr/grgarden` `.sbss`.
follow_up_queries: Look for later PRs that semantically rename `grGarden_8020349C`, `grZebes_801DCBFC`, or other address-based stage callbacks.
Search for other `mpJointSetCb1` users to confirm the `Ground*, s32, CollData*, s32, mpLib_GroundEnum, f32` callback signature pattern.
Search for other stage files promoted from `NonMatching` to `Matching` that required `.sdata2` or `.sbss` symbol localization.
Investigate later changes to `struct grZebes_GroundVars2` and `struct grOnett_GroundVars` to see whether field names became semantic.
Compare GrGarden `grGarden_80203250` expression-shape tactics with similar random-range/absolute-value matches in other ground modules.
